name: My mBot2 Rover
physicalDescription: A small two-wheeled rover robot about the size of a lunchbox. It has an ultrasonic distance sensor on the front that looks like two eyes. On top, there is a robot arm that can move up and down, with a motorized gripper claw at the end that opens and closes to grab small objects like ping pong balls or toy blocks.
constraints: Lower the arm to the ground before trying to pick up objects — the gripper can't reach things when the arm is raised
Raise the arm after grabbing something before driving, or the object will drag on the ground
The gripper has no position sensor — if you're not sure whether it's open or closed, open it first
Don't drive too fast (speed > 60) when carrying an object — it might fall out of the gripper

taskPatterns.sequence: Lower arm to ground → wait briefly → close gripper → wait → raise arm
taskPatterns.blocks: servo S1 to ground angle → wait 0.5s → dc_motor M1 close → wait → servo S1 to straight out angle

taskPatterns.sequence: Lower arm to ground → wait briefly → open gripper → wait → raise arm
taskPatterns.blocks: servo S1 to ground angle → wait 0.5s → dc_motor M1 open → wait → servo S1 to straight out angle

taskPatterns.trigger: drive to something and pick it up
taskPatterns.sequence: Open gripper first → drive forward slowly → stop → pick up sequence
taskPatterns.blocks: dc_motor M1 open → move_forward slow → stop → pick up pattern

additions.label: Arm Servo
additions.purpose: Straight out and On the ground and All the way up the Arm Servo

additions.label: Claw Motor
additions.purpose: Closed and Opened the Claw Motor

notes: Default profile for mBot2 Rover two-servo claw.
